mapper.sql: id, project_id, source_discovery_id, correlation_id, idempotency_key, status, CAST(input_jsonb AS TEXT) AS input_jsonb, CAST(provider_policy_jsonb AS TEXT) AS provider_policy_jsonb, CAST(provider_trace_jsonb AS TEXT) AS provider_trace_jsonb, CAST(candidates_jsonb AS TEXT) AS candidates_jsonb, CAST(validation_jsonb AS TEXT) AS validation_jsonb, CAST(provenance_jsonb AS TEXT) AS provenance_jsonb, CAST(failure_jsonb AS TEXT) AS failure_jsonb, created_by, confirmed_candidate_id, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, materialized_run_id, created_at, updated_at, expires_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM scenario_authoring_job WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE scenario_authoring_job SET confirmed_candidate_id = #{confirmedCandidateId}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}, confirmed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW()) AND confirmed_candidate_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
